nodes.label: AI as writing assistant
nodes.grounding_span: AI helps me come up with more professional ways to get my ideas across

nodes.label: AI as knowledge gap filler
nodes.label_negative: Relying solely on memory for rare conditions
nodes.grounding_span: ask general/medical questions about topics or conditions I do not often see in the clinic so that I get a quick refresher

nodes.label: AI for documentation efficiency
nodes.label_negative: Manual documentation consuming patient care time
nodes.grounding_span: If AI can help me spend more time with my patients and decrease my documentation time, I am all for it

nodes.label: Personalized patient communication
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer the email to sound like it is coming from me, so I like to add personal touches

nodes.label: AI as research assistant for clinical knowledge
nodes.label_negative: AI as threat to clinical expertise
nodes.grounding_span: I recognize that it is an asset

nodes.label: Patient-centered care
nodes.grounding_span: spend more time with my patients and decrease my documentation time

nodes.label: Professional competence
nodes.grounding_span: professional letters...always sound and look better when I use AI to assist

nodes.label: Authentic human connection and trust
nodes.grounding_span: patient knows that I care about

nodes.label: Reluctance to use AI for writing
nodes.grounding_span: Most of the time, I am satisfied when using AI at work

nodes.label: Preference for personal touch in patient emails
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer the email to sound like it is coming from me

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for documentation
nodes.grounding_span: AI will be able to listen in on evaluations and create documents for me

nodes.label: Collaborative iterative refinement — works back and forth with AI
nodes.grounding_span: I'll ask the AI to write a draft, then I may ask it to make revisions or take out a specific word

nodes.label: Principled boundary setting — preserves human touch in communication
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer the email to sound like it is coming from me, so I like to add personal touches
